en_US: According to one theory, Mt. Coronet
is where the Sinnoh region began.
...In a newly created world...
A world where only time flowed and
space expanded...
There should have been no strife.
But what became of that world?
Because the human spirit is weak and
incomplete, strife has spread...
This world is being ruined by it...
I find this state of affairs to be
deplorable...
...Indeed, Master Cyrus.
Such strife should never have been.
You there...
You are the trainer who defeated
Commanders Mars and Jupiter!
So you are the one meddling in
the plans of Team Galactic...
I, Saturn, shall put an end to
your interference here and now!
...Tch. Defeated, am I?
No matter. You cannot hope to stop
what the boss has set in motion...
